user.title: Connect to OpenClaw
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to an OpenClaw OpenAI-compatible gateway.

data_description.base_url: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The integration automatically normalizes it to end with /v1.
data_description.api_key: Operator token used to access the OpenClaw gateway.
data_description.model: Model name to use for conversation and AI task requests.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to OpenClaw
reauth_confirm.description: Update the bearer token for the configured OpenClaw gateway.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the OpenClaw gateway.
error.invalid_url: The provided URL is not valid.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for more details.

abort.already_configured: This OpenClaw gateway is already configured.

data_description.prompt: Optional system prompt prepended to each conversation.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Optional Home Assistant tool APIs exposed to the model.
data_description.max_tokens: Upper bound for output tokens per request.
data_description.temperature: Higher values make responses more varied.
data_description.top_p: Nucleus sampling limit sent to the gateway.
